title: Emit provider cooldown status details
goal: Make provider cooldown waits visible in reactive status details for Anthropic and OpenRouter, matching OpenAI's user-facing rate-limit feedback.
completionConditions: Anthropic emits a StatusDetail during provider rate-limit cooldown waits.
OpenRouter emits a StatusDetail during provider rate-limit cooldown waits.
Provider wait durations use a shared compact formatter so cooldown/backpressure details are consistent.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Small follow-up to issue #27 after documenting backpressure configuration. Keep behavior limited to status detail visibility and shared formatting.
